questions.question: What is the purpose of the break statement in Python?
What is the purpose of the continue statement in Python?
keyPoints: Skips the current iteration of a loop
Moves on to the next iteration

questions.question: How does the break statement differ from the continue statement?
keyPoints: Break statement exits the loop entirely
Continue statement skips the current iteration

questions.question: Explain the usage of the break statement in Python with an example.
keyPoints: Break statement is used to exit a loop prematurely
Example code demonstrates the usage of the break statement

questions.question: Explain the usage of the continue statement in Python with an example.
keyPoints: Continue statement is used to skip the current iteration of a loop
Example code demonstrates the usage of the continue statement

questions.question: Can the break statement be used with a for loop?
keyPoints: Yes, the break statement can be used with a for loop

questions.question: Can the continue statement be used with a while loop?
keyPoints: Yes, the continue statement can be used with a while loop
